name: API Security Guard
description: After editing an API endpoint, reminds Kiro to verify session auth, credit checks, and rate limiting are present

then.prompt: An API endpoint file was just edited. Please review it and verify: (1) session authentication is checked via event.locals.supabase.auth.getSession() or event.locals.session, (2) if this endpoint consumes credits, the credit check via comprehensive-usage-limits.server.ts is present, (3) rate limiting is applied where appropriate via src/lib/utils/rateLimiter.ts. If any of these are missing, flag them clearly. Do not make changes — just report.
